info.title: Fix nem project compilation with JavaParser

parts.text: "Project @nem/ does not compile. Plan: 1) Run mvn compile in the project @nem/ to get the compilation errors only. 2) Generate a JavaParser source code transformation to fix the errors.    - Use the project in folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/ as the base project template.    - Use JavaParser AST manipulation to create the transformation.    - Save the transformation rules inside the folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/, e.g., in /workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java.    - Use the JavaParser API documentation located in folder /workspace/javaparser-api-docs/ for reference. 3) Ensure the generated transformation compiles correctly. 4) Apply the transformation to fix the compilation errors. 5) Verify that the project now compiles successfully with mvn compile. "

This is a complex multi-step task. Let me break it down:

1. Run `mvn compile` in the `/workspace/nem/` project to get compilation errors
2. Look at the JavaParser base template project structure
3. Look at the JavaParser API docs for reference
4. Create a JavaParser transformation to fix the errors
5. Compile the transformation
6. Apply the transformation to fix the nem project
7. Verify the fix by running `mvn compile` again

Let me start by running the compilation and exploring the project structures in parallel.

24:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
25:         if (args.length < 1) {
26:             System.err.println("Usage: java Main <path-to-java-file>");
27:             System.exit(1);
28:         }

30:         Path filePath = Path.of(args[0]);

32: 
33:         JavaParser parser = new JavaParser();
34:         ParseResult<CompilationUnit> parseResult = parser.parse(sourceCode);
35:

45:         System.out.println("Transformation complete: " + filePath);
46:     }

48:     public static void transformFlywayUsage(CompilationUnit cu) {
49:         cu.findAll(MethodDeclaration.class).forEach(method -> {
50:             if (method.getTypeAsString().equals("org.flywaydb.core.Flyway") || 
51:                 method.getTypeAsString().equals("Flyway")) {
52:                 
53:                 if (!method.getBody().isPresent()) {
54:                     return;
55:                 }
56:                 
57:                 List<Statement> statements = method.getBody().get().getStatements();
58:                 List<Statement> newStatements = new ArrayList<>();
59:                 
60:                 Statement flywayCreationStmt = null;
61:                 List<ExpressionStmt> setterCalls = new ArrayList<>();
62:                 ReturnStmt returnStmt = null;
63:                 
64:                 for (Statement stmt : statements) {
65:                     if (stmt instanceof ExpressionStmt) {
66:                         ExpressionStmt exprStmt = (ExpressionStmt) stmt;
67:                         Expression expr = exprStmt.getExpression();
68:                         
69:                         if (expr instanceof MethodCallExpr) {
70:                             MethodCallExpr methodCall = (MethodCallExpr) expr;
71:                             if (isFlywaySetter(methodCall)) {
72:                                 setterCalls.add(exprStmt);
73:                                 continue;
74:                             }
75:                         }
76:                         
77:                         if (expr instanceof ObjectCreationExpr) {
78:                             ObjectCreationExpr creation = (ObjectCreationExpr) expr;
79:                             if (creation.getType().asString().endsWith("Flyway")) {
80:                                 flywayCreationStmt = stmt;
81:                                 continue;
82:                             }
83:                         }
84:                         
85:                         newStatements.add(stmt);
86:                     } else if (stmt instanceof ReturnStmt) {
87:                         returnStmt = (ReturnStmt) stmt;
88:                     } else {
89:                         newStatements.add(stmt);
90:                     }
91:                 }
92:                 
93:                 if (flywayCreationStmt != null && !setterCalls.isEmpty() && returnStmt != null) {
94:                     MethodCallExpr configureCall = new MethodCallExpr(
95:                         new NameExpr("Flyway"),
96:                         "configure"
97:                     );
98:                     
99:                     MethodCallExpr chainedCall = configureCall;
100:                     for (ExpressionStmt setter : setterCalls) {
101:                         MethodCallExpr setterCall = (MethodCallExpr) setter.getExpression();
102:                         String setterName = setterCall.getNameAsString();
103:                         String builderName = setterName.substring(3);
104:                         builderName = Character.toLowerCase(builderName.charAt(0)) + builderName.substring(1);
105:                         
106:                         chainedCall = new MethodCallExpr(
107:                             chainedCall,
108:                             builderName,
109:                             setterCall.getArguments()
110:                         );
111:                     }
112:                     
113:                     MethodCallExpr loadCall = new MethodCallExpr(chainedCall, "load");
114:                     ReturnStmt newReturn = new ReturnStmt(loadCall);
115:                     newStatements.add(newReturn);
116:                     
117:                     method.getBody().get().setStatements(newStatements);
118:                 }
119:             }

156:                     }
157:                 }
158:                 
159:                 if (flywayCreationStmt != null && !setterCalls.isEmpty() && returnStmt != null) {
160:                     MethodCallExpr configureCall = new MethodCallExpr(

163:                     );

165:                     MethodCallExpr chainedCall = configureCall;
166:                     for (ExpressionStmt setter : setterCalls) {
167:                         MethodCallExpr setterCall = (MethodCallExpr) setter.getExpression();
168:                         String setterName = setterCall.getNameAsString();
169:                         String builderName = setterName.substring(3);
170:                         builderName = Character.toLowerCase(builderName.charAt(0)) + builderName.substring(1);
171:

Actually, looking at the Flyway 9.x API, the configure() method returns a `Flyway` object, not a `FluentConfiguration`. Let me check the API more carefully.

Actually, looking at the error message:
```
symbol:   method classLoader(java.lang.ClassLoader)
location: class org.flywaydb.core.api.configuration.FluentConfiguration
```

This suggests that `Flyway.configure()` returns a `FluentConfiguration`, but the method `classLoader` doesn't exist. Looking at Flyway 9.x documentation, the method might be named differently.

Let me check the Flyway 9.x API. In Flyway 9.x, the configure() method returns a `Flyway` object directly, and the builder methods are on the `Flyway` class itself. But the error says it's looking for the method on `FluentConfiguration`.

Actually, looking at Flyway 9.x more carefully:
- `Flyway.configure()` returns `Flyway` 
- The builder methods like `dataSource()`, `locations()`, etc. are on the `Flyway` class

But the error says the method is being looked for on `FluentConfiguration`. This is confusing.

Wait, I think I understand now. In Flyway 9.x, the API changed:
- `Flyway.configure()` returns a `Flyway` object
- But the builder methods might be on a different class

Actually, looking at Flyway 9.17.0 documentation more carefully:
- `Flyway.configure()` returns `Flyway` 
- The methods are `dataSource()`, `locations()`, `validateOnMigrate()`, etc.

But there's no `classLoader()` method in Flyway 9.x! The classLoader is set differently.


I need to find the correct way to set the classLoader in Flyway 9.x. Looking at the API, `configuration()` returns a `Configuration` object that can be used to build a `Flyway` instance with custom settings. The classLoader might need to be set through the `Configuration` builder instead of directly on the `Flyway` object.

Actually, checking the Flyway 9.x documentation more carefully, the `classLoader()` method should be available on the `Flyway` class itself as part of the fluent configuration API. The error message indicates the method isn't being found on `FluentConfiguration`, which suggests there might be a version mismatch or the method signature is different than expected.

Looking at the actual Flyway 9.x API, `configure()` returns a `Flyway` instance directly, not a separate configuration builder. The builder methods like `dataSource()`, `locations()`, and `validateOnMigrate()` should all be available on that returned object. The `classLoader()` method should also be present, but the compilation error suggests it's not being recognized—possibly due to how the methods are being chained or a dependency version issue.

I should check what configuration methods are actually available in this version. The `classLoader()` setter might have been removed or renamed in Flyway 9.x, or it could require a different approach like using `Configuration.Builder` instead. Let me verify the exact API for this version and adjust the method calls accordingly.

private static boolean isFlywaySetter(MethodCallExpr methodCall) {
        String name = methodCall.getNameAsString();
        return name.equals("setDataSource") ||
               name.equals("setClassLoader") ||
               name.equals("setLocations") ||
               name.equals("setValidateOnMigrate") ||
               name.equals("setBaselineOnMigrate") ||
               name.equals("setBaselineVersion") ||
               name.equals("setCleanDisabled") ||
               name.equals("setEncoding") ||
               name.equals("setGroup") ||
               name.equals("setIgnoreMissingMigrations") ||
               name.equals("setIgnoreIgnoredMigrations") ||
               name.equals("setIgnoreFutureMigrations") ||
               name.equals("setInstalledBy") ||
               name.equals("setInitSql") ||
               name.equals("setLockRetryCount") ||
               name.equals("setMixed") ||
               name.equals("setOutOfOrder") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholderReplacement") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholders") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholderPrefix") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholderSeparator") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholderSuffix") ||
               name.equals("setRepeatableSqlMigrationPrefix") ||
               name.equals("setResolvers") ||
               name.equals("setSkipDefaultCallbacks") ||
               name.equals("setSkipDefaultResolvers") ||
               name.equals("setSqlMigrationPrefix") ||
               name.equals("setSqlMigrationSuffixes") ||

               name.equals("setTablespace") ||
               name.equals("setTarget") ||
               name.equals("setValidateMigrationNaming") ||
               name.equals("setValidateTimestampFormat") ||
               name.equals("setWorkingDirectory");
    }

private static boolean isFlywaySetter(MethodCallExpr methodCall) {
        String name = methodCall.getNameAsString();
        return name.equals("setDataSource") ||
               name.equals("setLocations") ||
               name.equals("setValidateOnMigrate") ||
               name.equals("setBaselineOnMigrate") ||
               name.equals("setBaselineVersion") ||
               name.equals("setCleanDisabled") ||
               name.equals("setEncoding") ||
               name.equals("setGroup") ||
               name.equals("setIgnoreMissingMigrations") ||
               name.equals("setIgnoreIgnoredMigrations") ||
               name.equals("setIgnoreFutureMigrations") ||
               name.equals("setInstalledBy") ||
               name.equals("setInitSql") ||
               name.equals("setLockRetryCount") ||
               name.equals("setMixed") ||
               name.equals("setOutOfOrder") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholderReplacement") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholders") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholderPrefix") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholderSeparator") ||
               name.equals("setPlaceholderSuffix") ||
               name.equals("setRepeatableSqlMigrationPrefix") ||
               name.equals("setResolvers") ||
               name.equals("setSkipDefaultCallbacks") ||
               name.equals("setSkipDefaultResolvers") ||
               name.equals("setSqlMigrationPrefix") ||
               name.equals("setSqlMigrationSuffixes") ||
               name.equals("setTable") ||
               name.equals("setTablespace") ||
               name.equals("setTarget") ||
               name.equals("setValidateMigrationNaming") ||
               name.equals("setValidateTimestampFormat") ||
               name.equals("setWorkingDirectory");
    }

    private static boolean shouldSkipSetter(String setterName) {
        return setterName.equals("setClassLoader");
    }

23: public class Main {
24: 
25:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
26:         if (args.length < 1) {
27:             System.err.println("Usage: java Main <path-to-java-file>");
28:             System.exit(1);
29:         }
30: 
31:         Path filePath = Path.of(args[0]);
32:         String sourceCode = Files.readString(filePath);
33: 
34:         JavaParser parser = new JavaParser();
35:         ParseResult<CompilationUnit> parseResult = parser.parse(sourceCode);
36: 
37:         if (!parseResult.isSuccessful() || parseResult.getResult().isEmpty()) {
38:             System.err.println("Failed to parse file: " + parseResult.getProblems());
39:             System.exit(1);

45:         Files.writeString(filePath, cu.toString());
46:         System.out.println("Transformation complete: " + filePath);
47:     }
48: 
49:     public static void transformFlywayUsage(CompilationUnit cu) {
50:         cu.findAll(MethodDeclaration.class).forEach(method -> {
51:             if (method.getTypeAsString().equals("org.flywaydb.core.Flyway") || 
52:                 method.getTypeAsString().equals("Flyway")) {
53:                 
54:                 if (!method.getBody().isPresent()) {
55:                     return;
56:                 }
57:                 
58:                 List<Statement> statements = method.getBody().get().getStatements();
59:                 List<Statement> newStatements = new ArrayList<>();
60:                 
61:                 List<ExpressionStmt> setterCalls = new ArrayList<>();
62:                 ReturnStmt returnStmt = null;
63:                 boolean hasFlywayCreation = false;
64:                 
65:                 for (Statement stmt : statements) {
66:                     if (stmt instanceof ExpressionStmt) {
67:                         ExpressionStmt exprStmt = (ExpressionStmt) stmt;
68:                         Expression expr = exprStmt.getExpression();
69:                         
70:                         if (expr instanceof VariableDeclarationExpr) {
71:                             VariableDeclarationExpr varDecl = (VariableDeclarationExpr) expr;
72:                             if (varDecl.getElementType().asString().endsWith("Flyway")) {
73:                                 if (varDecl.getVariable(0).getInitializer().isPresent() &&
74:                                     varDecl.getVariable(0).getInitializer().get() instanceof ObjectCreationExpr) {
75:                                     ObjectCreationExpr creation = (ObjectCreationExpr) varDecl.getVariable(0).getInitializer().get();
76:                                     if (creation.getType().asString().endsWith("Flyway")) {
77:                                         hasFlywayCreation = true;
78:                                         continue;
79:                                     }
80:                                 }
81:                             }
82:                         }
83:                         
84:                         if (expr instanceof MethodCallExpr) {
85:                             MethodCallExpr methodCall = (MethodCallExpr) expr;
86:                             if (isFlywaySetter(methodCall)) {
87:                                 setterCalls.add(exprStmt);
88:                                 continue;
89:                             }
90:                         }
91:                         
92:                         newStatements.add(stmt);
93:                     } else if (stmt instanceof ReturnStmt) {
94:                         returnStmt = (ReturnStmt) stmt;
95:                     } else {
96:                         newStatements.add(stmt);
97:                     }
98:                 }
99:                 
100:                 if (hasFlywayCreation && !setterCalls.isEmpty() && returnStmt != null) {
101:                     MethodCallExpr configureCall = new MethodCallExpr(
102:                         new NameExpr("Flyway"),
103:                         "configure"
104:                     );
105:                     
106:                     MethodCallExpr chainedCall = configureCall;
107:                     for (ExpressionStmt setter : setterCalls) {
108:                         MethodCallExpr setterCall = (MethodCallExpr) setter.getExpression();
109:                         String setterName = setterCall.getNameAsString();
110:                         String builderName = setterName.substring(3);
111:                         builderName = Character.toLowerCase(builderName.charAt(0)) + builderName.substring(1);
112:                         
113:                         chainedCall = new MethodCallExpr(
114:                             chainedCall,
115:                             builderName,
116:                             setterCall.getArguments()
117:                         );
118:                     }
119:                     
120:                     MethodCallExpr loadCall = new MethodCallExpr(chainedCall, "load");
121:                     ReturnStmt newReturn = new ReturnStmt(loadCall);
122:                     newStatements.add(newReturn);
123:                     
124:                     method.getBody().get().setStatements(new NodeList<>(newStatements));
125:                 }
126:             }
127:         });
128:     }
129: 
130:     private static boolean isFlywaySetter(MethodCallExpr methodCall) {
131:         String name = methodCall.getNameAsString();
132:         return name.equals("setDataSource") ||
133:                name.equals("setLocations") ||
134:                name.equals("setValidateOnMigrate") ||
135:                name.equals("setBaselineOnMigrate") ||

162:                name.equals("setValidateMigrationNaming") ||
163:                name.equals("setValidateTimestampFormat") ||
164:                name.equals("setWorkingDirectory");
